trigger_condition.note: Transition from constant-contract (1 contract) to fixed fractional when equity grows

sizing_rule.note: Small accounts start with 1 contract constant-contract trading, then transition to optimal f fixed fractional sizing (optimal f = 0.25, or 1 bet per $4 equity). Formula: Position Size = Account Equity / (Biggest Historical Loss / -Optimal F). Sizing scales with account growth and historical drawdown rather than fixed dollar amounts.

source_rule_text: Small accounts starting with constant-contract trading should trade 1 contract initially, then transition to fixed fractional trading based on optimal f as equity grows.
